notes.1: Named primary sources on cover (GeneReviews, MedlinePlus, StatPearls, NORD)
notes.2: Most stats tagged; a few ordinal severity bars less tightly cited
notes.6: Age stages written; timeline chart had overlapping text
notes.8: Charts present but pathway cutoffs + timeline overlap fail QA

notes.1: Primary sources on cover + per-figure source lines + full reference list
notes.2: Every figure caption has sources; severity chart labeled educational synthesis
notes.3: Geography emphasized; linear scale labeled correctly (not false 'log')
notes.4: Pathway figure fully legible; common African allele context retained
notes.5: Milder vision note + severity chart OCA3 highlight retained
notes.6: Timeline rebuilt with even spacing + callout for ~1-year-old focus
notes.7: Care-team chart + red flags + school supports complete
notes.8: All charts re-exported RGB; no cutoffs; captions/sources intact
notes.10: Disclaimer + red flags + no-cure framing explicit

metrics.name: Source Quality
metrics.definition: Primary claims backed by GeneReviews, MedlinePlus, NORD, StatPearls, OMIM, peer-reviewed reviews

metrics.name: Claim–Citation Density
metrics.definition: Key numerical/clinical claims tagged to named sources; no orphan statistics

metrics.name: Prevalence Accuracy
metrics.definition: OCA3 ~1/8,500 African pops.; overall OCA ~1/17k–20k; ranges and geography noted

metrics.name: Genetics Specificity
metrics.definition: TYRP1, OMIM 203290, autosomal recessive, carrier risks, differential vs syndromic

metrics.name: Phenotype Differentiation
metrics.definition: Rufous/red phenotype vs OCA1/2/4 clearly contrasted with milder ocular phenotype

metrics.name: Age-Staged Watch Signs
metrics.definition: Infancy→toddler→school→adolescence actionable watch items for a 1-year-old

metrics.name: Care Actionability
metrics.definition: Ophthalmology, dermatology, low vision, sun safety, genetics counseling next steps

metrics.name: Data-Backed Visuals
metrics.definition: Charts use literature numbers; captions include source notes; no cutoffs/overlap

metrics.name: Caregiver Usability
metrics.definition: Plain language + precise terms; no scare tactics; hope + realistic expectations

metrics.name: Safety & Scope
metrics.definition: Not medical advice disclaimer; red-flag when-to-call; no cure claims
